feature-two-column-scene.props: {"headline":"Beads Compatibility","subhead":"Instant Kanban board for Beads projects","bodyPrimary":"Launch Kanbus on existing Beads files and get immediate workflow visibility.","leftRatio":0.4,"rightPanel":"pictogram","pictogramType":"beads","pictogramScale":1.22}

{"headline":"Beads Compatibility","subhead":"Instant Kanban board for Beads projects","bodyPrimary":"Kanbus reads Beads issue files directly, so teams get a full interactive board without migration overhead.","bodySecondary":"Adopt Kanbus features incrementally and switch formats only when it makes sense for your workflow.","leftRatio":0.4,"rightPanel":"beads-demo"}

cue.label: Introduction
cue.voice: Already using Beads? Kanbus gives you an instant Kanban board with full support for your existing issues.

cue.label: Instant Migration
cue.voice: Just launch the console and Kanbus reads your existing Beads issue files directly. No conversion, no import scripts, no migration freeze.

cue.label: Dual Support
cue.voice: Start using Kanbus features today and switch formats entirely only when it makes sense. The high-performance Rust CLI works directly on your data files.
